reviews.comment:
Nostalgia pura. Hermoso para parar a comer algo y descansar

(Translated by Google)
Pure nostalgia. A beautiful place to stop for a bite to eat and a rest.

reviews.comment:
Impecables los baños, especialmente los que son para discapacitados....lugar agradable para tomar un capuchino,café,o lo qe te guste....

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are spotless, especially the ones for disabled guests...a nice place to have a cappuccino, coffee, or whatever you like...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYOGRPUndBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar con historia, siempre con un estilo de satisfacer al cliente,  con la atención y las ricas cosas  de elaboración propia ...  todo rico !!!

(Translated by Google)
A place with history, always focused on customer satisfaction, with attentive service and delicious homemade treats... everything is delicious!!!

reviews.comment:
Lastima que la entrada a los baños está siempre llena de perros

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame the entrance to the bathrooms is always full of dogs.

reviews.comment:
Una estación con todos sus servicios muy bien puesta,excelente limpieza y cordial atención. Vale la pena parar para atender el auto o simplemente hacer una pausa.

(Translated by Google)
A well-equipped service station with all the amenities, excellent cleanliness, and friendly service. It's worth stopping to service your car or simply take a break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYMnE2SC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Entramos a comparar las medialunas con más de Atalaya y nada que ver. El local anticuado. El café estuvo bien

(Translated by Google)
We went in to compare the croissants with those from Atalaya and they were nothing alike. The place is outdated. The coffee was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYZ3JhaWNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor y lo peor. Los perros.
El baño medio pelo tirando a sucio.. aceptable como el baño de constitucion masomenos.
Adentro venden de todo. Hay una vitrina para productos sin tacc. El agua del mate 400 mangos medio caro para lo que es...

(Translated by Google)
The best and the worst: The dogs.
The bathroom is average, bordering on dirty... acceptable, like the bathroom.
Inside, they sell everything. There's a display case for gluten-free products. The mate water, 400 bucks, is kind of expensive for what it is...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYMU1HTHpBRRAB
